current_truth.active_files:
/workspace/src/services/refreshTokenService.ts:

- Implements refresh-token rotation with reuse detection using SHA-256 hashing of raw token + pepper.
- Uses atomic transaction to insert new token and revoke old one in a single operation, ensuring chain integrity.
- Reuse detection invalidates entire session chain via chainRevokedAt on all rows in same sessionId.
- Validates token expiry, user match, and session integrity with defensive checks against malformed data (null/undefined/expiry).
- Includes boot-time guard to enforce secure pepper configuration, rejecting dev placeholder in non-dev environments.
- Hashing is deterministic and uses a pepper from config, ensuring constant-time comparisons.
- Session chain tracking via sessionId ensures session continuity and auditability.
